Oracc: blms — Bilinguals in Late Mesopotamian Scholarship

GAAL 2, pl. 14 (BM 064377+)

Obverse
o 1o 1

ŋešig ŋešsaŋ-kul-ta ⸢sa⸣ nu-⸢duḫ⸣-u₃-da ḫe₂-⸢ni⸣-[ib₂-sir₃-re-e]-⸢ne⸣

(o 1) They will [detain him] (in a house) with a door and a bolt that cannot be unlocked.
dal-tu₄ sik-ku-ru mar-ka-su la pa-ṭa-⸢ri⸣ [lik-lu-šu₂]
o 2o 2

kun₄ za-ra-ta mu-un-us₂-la-aḫ-ḫe-e-ne

(o 2) If he slips through the thresholds and the door pivots,
ša₂ ina as-kup-pa-ti u ṣer-ri i-ziq-qu
rest of obverse not edited

Edited by Jeremiah Peterson for the BLMS project
